content.explanation:
💬 What are HTML Comments?

Comments are notes you write inside your code for yourself or other developers.

They are completely invisible on the website when it runs in the browser.

🧠 Simple Idea

Think of comments like sticky notes inside your code.

They help you remember things, but users never see them.
content.syntax_breakdown:
🔧 Comment Syntax

HTML comments always look like this:

<!-- This is a comment -->

📦 Multi-line Comments

<!--
This is a comment
It can span multiple lines
-->

⚡ Why Comments are Useful

  • 🧠 Explain your code
  • 🐛 Debug problems
  • 🚫 Temporarily disable code

editor_sandbox.starter_code:

mini_challenge.hint: 👉 Example: Everything inside will be invisible

quiz_engine.question: What happens to content inside an HTML comment?
options: It is shown in a different color on the webpage
It is completely ignored and invisible in the browser
quiz_engine.explanation_feedback: Correct 🎉 Anything inside <!-- --> is completely ignored by the browser and never shown on the webpage.

takeaways: Comments are invisible notes inside code
They help developers understand and organize code
Comments do not appear on the final website
They are useful for debugging and testing
